seo.title: Tax Lawyer in Lahore | Income Tax, FBR & ATIR Appeals — Saeed Law Firm
seo.description: Tax lawyer in Lahore handling income tax notices, FBR audits, Commissioner Appeals, and ATIR cases. Sales tax and FED disputes. 50+ years' practice.

hero.intro: Tax lawyer in Lahore handling income tax notices, FBR audits, Commissioner Appeals, and ATIR cases. Sales tax and FED disputes. 50+ years' practice.

bodyMarkdown:
Tax cases in Pakistan are unforgiving. Limitation periods are short, technical defences decide more cases than substantive arguments, and forum selection (Commissioner Appeals, ATIR, Lahore High Court Tax Bench) determines outcomes. A **tax lawyer in Lahore** who responds to notices the same week, files appeals within statutory windows, and structures stay applications correctly is the difference between a manageable assessment and a recovery action against your bank account. **Saeed Law Firm** has practised tax law in Lahore since 1975, with appearances at the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals), the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue Lahore, and the Lahore High Court Tax Bench.

### Pakistani Tax Statutes — What Your Tax Lawyer Must Know

- **Income Tax Ordinance 2001** — primary income tax statute; sections 122 (amendment), 161 (withholding), 177 (audit), 176 (records), 182 (penalties)
- **Sales Tax Act 1990** — federal sales tax; input adjustment, refund procedure
- **Federal Excise Act 2005** — FED on listed goods and services
- **Punjab Sales Tax on Services Act 2012** — provincial sales tax in Punjab
- **Customs Act 1969** — customs duty disputes

### FBR Notices — What Each One Means and How to Respond

Every FBR notice has a deadline, and missing the deadline closes defences. The notices most frequently received in Lahore are:

**Section 122 (amendment of assessment).** FBR's power to revisit a return up to five years from the end of the tax year. A reply must engage on facts and law within the time stipulated. Default leads to ex parte amendment.

**Section 161 (withholding tax recovery).** Recovery against tax withholders who failed to deduct or deposit. Common against employers, landlords, and contractors. Requires reconciliation of withholding statements and challan production.

**Section 177 (audit selection).** Selection for audit. The taxpayer must produce records (Section 176). A serious **tax lawyer in Lahore** prepares the records bundle, accompanies the audit, and contests proposed adjustments at show-cause stage.

**Section 176 (production of records).** Specific records demand within timeline. Default invites adverse inference.

**Section 182 (penalties).** Penalty levies for non-compliance. Most penalties are appealable.

This sequence of sections — and the strategy to respond to each — is the unique-value layer that distinguishes a competent **tax lawyer in Lahore** from a generalist.

### Tax Forums in Lahore

- **Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals) Lahore** — first appellate forum; appeal within 30 days of assessment order
- **[Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue (ATIR) Lahore](/courts/tax-tribunal-lawyer-lahore)** — second appeal on facts and law; appeal within 60 days of CIR(A) order
- **[Lahore High Court Tax Bench](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court)** — references on questions of law only under Section 133 IT Ordinance 2001
- **Supreme Court of Pakistan** — final appeal

### Tax Matters We Handle

- Income tax notices under Sections 122, 161, 176, 177, 182
- FBR audit defence and audit closure
- Commissioner Appeals filings and arguments
- ATIR appeals at Lahore Tribunal
- Tax references at Lahore High Court Tax Bench
- Sales tax registration disputes, refund denials, and input adjustment cases
- Federal Excise Duty classification disputes
- Withholding tax reconciliations
- Wealth statement defence and reconciliation
- Property valuation challenges (DC rates vs FBR rates)
- Stay applications during pendency of appeal

### Income Tax Lawyer in Lahore — Salaried, Self-Employed, and Corporate

An **income tax lawyer in Lahore** typically works across three audiences with very different cases:

**Salaried taxpayers.** Notices arising from mismatch between filed return and employer withholding statements, declared assets, and bank inflows. Most are resolvable at notice-reply stage with proper reconciliation.

**Self-employed and AOPs.** Section 177 audits are common. Sales reconciliation, expense disallowance, and unexplained inflows are the main contests. Documentation discipline matters more than arguments.

**Corporate taxpayers.** Transfer pricing, inter-company loans, withholding compliance on payments to non-residents, and SECP-coordinated filings. Coordinated tax-and-corporate strategy is often required — see our [corporate lawyer in Lahore](/corporate-lawyer-in-lahore) page.

### Stay of Tax Demand

Tax demand is recoverable from the date of order unless stayed. ATIR has the power to grant stays during the pendency of appeal where the taxpayer demonstrates hardship and a prima facie case. A timely stay application protects against bank account attachment, which is the FBR's most disruptive recovery mechanism.

### Timeline and Fees

| Matter | Timeline | Fee |
|---|---|---|
| Notice reply (single section) | 7–30 days | Fixed |
| Audit defence (full year) | 6–12 months | Stage-based |
| Commissioner Appeal | 4–8 months | Fixed/stage |
| ATIR appeal | 12–24 months | Stage-based |
| LHC tax reference | 18–36 months | Stage-based |
| Stay application | 1–4 weeks | Fixed |

### Why Saeed Law Firm

50+ years of tax practice in Lahore, including FBR work since the income tax ordinances of the 1970s. Office at 13 Fane Road within walking distance of the LHC tax bench. Bilal Saeed, Advocate, supervises every tax engagement.

### Frequently Asked Questions

**How long do I have to reply to an FBR notice in Pakistan?**
Each section sets its own timeline. Section 176 records-production notices typically allow 14 days. Section 122 amendment notices vary by complexity. Missing a deadline forfeits the right to be heard at that stage.

**What is the difference between Commissioner Appeals and ATIR?**
Commissioner Appeals is the first appellate forum, typically reviewing the assessment order on facts and law. ATIR is the second appellate forum, also competent on facts. Beyond ATIR, only questions of law go to the Lahore High Court.

**Can I get a stay on tax recovery while appeal is pending?**
Yes. ATIR can grant stay during pendency of appeal. The application must show hardship and a prima facie case. Stays are not automatic and require careful drafting.

**How is tax demand recovered if I do not pay?**
FBR has bank account attachment, third-party recovery, and property attachment powers. A stay must be obtained quickly to prevent attachment.

**Do I need a lawyer for an income tax audit in Lahore?**
For routine reconciliations, a tax consultant may suffice. For Section 177 audits with material adjustments, a **tax lawyer in Lahore** with appellate experience is materially better — the audit positions taken now determine appeal prospects later.

**How much does a tax lawyer in Lahore charge?**
Notice replies are fixed-fee. Audit defence is stage-based. Appeals are stage-based with separate engagements per forum. CPC of $0.32 reflects the high commercial value — this work is priced higher than most other Lahore legal services.

### Related Lahore practice pages

Tax matters often run alongside corporate compliance, civil disputes, or property-valuation challenges. See our [corporate lawyer in Lahore](/corporate-lawyer-in-lahore) page for SECP-and-tax coordinated strategy, and the [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) page for valuation-driven tax disputes. Tax appeals progress through Commissioner Appeals, then the [ATIR tax tribunal in Lahore](/courts/tax-tribunal-lawyer-lahore), and finally the [Lahore High Court Tax Bench](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court). An income tax lawyer in Lahore who has appeared at all three forums sees the case differently from a notice-reply specialist. To meet Bilal Saeed, Advocate, [book a consultation](/contact-us).

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.
